Uses of Class
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.SerializeException

Packages that use SerializeException
Package
Description
org.apache.juneau.bean.hal
Juneau @Marshalled types for the HAL (Hypertext Application Language) hypermedia format, also covered by draft-kelly-json-hal-08.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi
Juneau @Marshalled types for the JSON:API v1.1 wire format.
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonschema
JSON Schema Data Transfer Objects
org.apache.juneau.config
Configuration Support
org.apache.juneau.examples.serializer
Serializer Examples
org.apache.juneau.marshall.bson
BSON (Binary JSON) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.cbor
CBOR (Concise Binary Object Representation) marshalling support per RFC 8949.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections
Collections classes.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.csv
CSV Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hjson
Hjson (Human JSON) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.hocon
HOCON (Human-Optimized Config Object Notation) format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.html
HTML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.httppart
HTTP Part Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini
INI format serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jcs
JCS (JSON Canonicalization Scheme) Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena
RDF Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.marshaller
Convenience marshallers pairing RDF serializers and parsers into single classes with fluent to/from methods.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json
JSON Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5
JSON5 Marshalling Support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonl
JSONL (JSON Lines) marshalling support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jsonschema
JSON-Schema Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown
Markdown serializer and parser support for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.marshaller
Marshallers
org.apache.juneau.marshall.msgpack
MessagePack Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.oapi
OpenAPI Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.parquet
Apache Parquet serialization and parsing support.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.plaintext
Plaintext Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer
Serializer API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.soap
SOAP/XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.sse
Server-Sent Events (SSE) marshalling support — text/event-stream.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.swap
Swap API
org.apache.juneau.marshall.toml
TOML v1.0.0 serializer and parser for Apache Juneau.
org.apache.juneau.marshall.uon
UON Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.urlencoding
URL-Encoding Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.xml
XML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.marshall.yaml
YAML Marshalling Support
org.apache.juneau.rest.server
REST Server API
org.apache.juneau.rest.server.converter
REST Response Converters

  • Uses of SerializeException in org.apache.juneau.config

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.config that throw SerializeException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Config
    Config.load(Map<String,Map<String,Object>> m)
    Loads the contents of the specified map of maps into this config.
    Config
    Config.set(String key, Object value)
    Adds or replaces an entry with the specified key with a POJO serialized to a string using the registered serializer.
    Config
    Config.set(String key, Object value, Serializer serializer)
    Same as Config.set(String, Object) but allows you to specify the serializer to use to serialize the value.
    Config
    Config.set(String key, Object value, Serializer serializer, String modifiers, String comment, List<String> preLines)
    Same as Config.set(String, Object) but allows you to specify all aspects of a value.
    Config
    Config.setSection(String name, List<String> preLines, Map<String,Object> contents)
    Creates the specified section if it doesn't exist.

  • Uses of SerializeException in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown

    Methods in org.apache.juneau.marshall.markdown that throw SerializeException
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    protected void
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession.doSerialize(SerializerPipe pipe, Object o)
     
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.doSerialize(SerializerPipe pipe, Object o)
     
    protected String[]
    MarkdownSerializerSession.getTableHeaders(Collection<?> c)
    Determines if a collection can be rendered as a multi-column table.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeAnything(MarkdownWriter w, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType, BeanPropertyMeta pMeta)
    Main serialization dispatch method.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeBeanMap(MarkdownWriter w, BeanMap<?> bm, ClassMeta<?> eType, ClassMeta<?> aType)
    Serializes a bean as a 2-column key/value Markdown table.
    protected void
    MarkdownDocSerializerSession.serializeBeanWithHeadings(MarkdownWriter w, BeanMap<?> bm, int level)
    Serializes a bean in document mode, using headings to structure nested objects.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeCollection(MarkdownWriter w, Collection<?> c, ClassMeta<?> eType, ClassMeta<?> cm)
    Serializes a collection as either a multi-column table (uniform beans/maps) or a bulleted list.
    protected String
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeInlineValue(Object o)
    Serializes a value for placement in a Markdown table cell.
    protected void
    MarkdownSerializerSession.serializeMap(MarkdownWriter w, Map<?,?> m, ClassMeta<?> cm)
    Serializes a Map as a 2-column key/value Markdown table.

    Generalize the specified object if a POJO swap is associated with it.

    Wraps the specified output object inside a writer.

    Specialized warning when an exception is thrown while executing a bean getter.
    protected final ClassMeta<?>
    SerializerSession.push2(String attrName, Object o, ClassMeta<?> eType)
    Same as MarshallingTraverseSession.push(String, Object, ClassMeta) but wraps MarshallingRecursionException inside SerializeException.

    OutputStreamSerializer.serialize(Object o)
    Convenience method for serializing an object to a byte.

    OutputStreamSerializerSession.serialize(Object o)
    Convenience method for serializing an object to a byte.
    Object
    Serializer.serialize(Object o)
    Shortcut method for serializing objects directly to either a String or byte[] depending on the serializer type.

    Serializer.serialize(Object o, Object output)
    Serializes a POJO to the specified output stream or writer.

    SerializerSession.serialize(Object o)
    Shortcut method for serializing objects directly to either a String or byte[] depending on the serializer type.

    SerializerSession.serialize(Object o, Object out)
